title: Deeyaalo Deeyaalo Lyrics Kayal Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Kayal Deeyaalo Deeyaalo Song Lyrics
Singer: Oranthanadu Gopu
Music: D Imman

Avamela aasa vechchaan
aniyaaya kadhal machchaan
azhu moonjaa ponaa machchaan

Varuvaannu poosa vachchaan
vazhimela kanna vachchaan
manasaala thee midhichchaan

Oru kannaadi kannaala odanjaan
avan nejoda nenja vachi kadanjaan

Vedhai vaikkaama ulloora velanjann
adha vellaama panna niththam alanjaan

Kraiyeri vandha meenu
karuvaada pogummnu
puriyaam pochae nanbaa

Ariyaam sonna sollu
palivaangi kolllumnnu
theriyaama poche nanbaa

Dhesai illaama
appo naan thirinjaen.
Vazhi illaama
ippo ingae oranjaen.

Vidhi pandhaada
kaaththoda maranjaen.
Sadhi pannaama
sottu sottaa karanjaen.

Varuvaadaa andha ponnu
varundhaama prayer pannu
varungalam vaanavillu.

Manasoda sogam ellaam
maranjaethaan pogummnnu
mulusaa nee nambi nillu.

Ava varumbodhu
anandha saaral.
Vazhi engaeyum
vanna vanna  thooral.

Idhu usuroda oyaadha thaedal
ada oru podhum kettadhilla kadhal

Varuvaadaa andha ponnu
varundhaama prayer pannu
varungalam vaanavillu.

Manasoda sogam ellaam
maranjaethaan pogummnnu
mulusaa nee nambi nillu.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Kayal, the song Deeyaalo Deeyaalo serves as a poignant expression of love and emotional turmoil. It reflects the protagonist's feelings of longing and heartache, beautifully conveyed through the soulful rendition of Oranthanadu Gopu. The lyrics, penned by Yugabharathi, evoke a sense of nostalgia and melancholy, making it relatable to anyone who has faced the complexities of love. This melody is not just a song but an experience that resonates deeply with the audience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Deeyaalo Deeyaalo from Kayal is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Sung by the talented Oranthanadu Gopu, this song features the enchanting music of D Imman, making it a perfect romantic ballad. Dive into the emotional depths of this track that resonates with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet nature of love.
stanzaMeanings: Deeyaalo Deeyaalo Deeyaalo Deeyaalo Deeyaalo Deeyaalo
He has placed hopes on her, and if he cries, it’s because of unfair love, my friend.
He has set a path for her to come, and with his eyes, he has ignited a fire in his heart.
With one glance, he got lost, and he broke his heart with his own heart.
Without any purpose, he has been wandering, and he has been doing this every day without fail.
Deeyaalo Deeyaalo Deeyaalo Deeyaalo Deeyaalo Deeyaalo
When the fish comes to the net, it understands that it will be caught, my friend.
If I say something that is not understood, it will be taken lightly, my friend.
Without a country, I realized. Without a path, I am lost here now.
I have forgotten my fate and lost my way. I have cried without achieving my goal.
Deeyaalo Deeyaalo Deeyaalo Deeyaalo Deeyaalo Deeyaalo
When that girl comes, she will pray with a troubled heart, let’s hope for the sky.
All the sorrows of the heart will vanish, you must believe completely and stand firm.
When she comes, it will be a joyful shower. The path will be filled with colorful rain.
This is not just a search for life; it’s not just a simple love that can be heard.
When that girl comes, she will pray with a troubled heart, let’s hope for the sky.
All the sorrows of the heart will vanish, you must believe completely and stand firm.
Deeyaalo Deeyaalo Deeyaalo Deeyaalo Deeyaalo Deeyaalo
